haeeed8f8g59a1g4f4fg9532gb488718cc183: We have made an ally from an enemy. Quite judicious.
h0fc6b369g23b3g4de9gac7agf2f808073244: Is it, though? I already regret letting her out.
h0abc1d4eg9a0bg4897gbacbg8496de19e2ed: The pest may be more use to us alive than dead.
h5b4652b6ga515g40e2gb742g4c2916a4492c: Should she serve us no purpose, we will simply exterminate her.
he28524aegb8b4g4f56g99edgf5fb1244df3f: I figured you'd rather have killed her.
h4b9ba95cgc3c9g4c26ga6acg990aafb37d32: I did the right thing. There's no honour in killing a caged rat.
h4b07888dg08fdg4402g8174g7919aa9da302: The point, it seems, has raced past you.
he72d28d6gedfbg467dg8e27gd34ea9da513d: No matter. If the pest serves us no purpose, we will exterminate her.
hb316fc93g3cacg4d26g81d5g8a6e9632b645: Indeed. This goblin priestess may be key to our healing.
h55b845fdg7e6bg4102gaa67g7efe0eeb1063: These vermin have no cure for us. But they may still serve a purpose.
h1c5f7a20g16d5g4e5dg995dgabf96404f70d: Should they not be of use, we will simply exterminate them.
